              1
            

            

                        cur_pos += closer_offset

                    def to_markdown(indent: 0)

      50.

                  def extract_headings(document)
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128. 
            
              10

      129. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    129. 
            
              10

      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130.

    131. 
            
              10
            

            

                    Array(document.blocks).each do |block|
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            
              25
            

            

                      if block.is_a?(Coradoc::Markdown::Heading)
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            
              22
            

            

                        headings << block if within_level_range?(block.level)
          
      134. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    134. 
            
              3
            

            

                      elsif block.respond_to?(:blocks)
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135.

      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136.

      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137.

    138.

    142.

    143. 
            
              1
            

            

                  def extract_headings_from_nested(block)

    144.

      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145.

      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            

            
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            

                    Array(block.blocks).each do |nested|

    148.

      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149.

      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

                      elsif nested.respond_to?(:blocks)
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151.

                  def within_level_range?(level)
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            
              22

      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160.

              1
            

            

                  def build_toc_tree(root, headings)

    164. 
            
              8
            

            

                    return if headings.empty?
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

            
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                    # Track section numbers for each level
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            
              8
            

            

                    counters = {}
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            

            
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

                    # Stack of entries at each level
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            
              8
            

            

                    stack = [root]
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

            
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            
              8
            

            

                    headings.each do |heading|
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            
              20
            

            

                      level = heading.level
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

            
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

                      # Update counters
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            
              20
            

            

                      counters[level] ||= 0
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            
              20
            

            

                      counters[level] += 1
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

                      # Reset counters for deeper levels
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            
              104
            

            

                      (level + 1..6).each { |l| counters[l] = 0 }
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

            
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181.

      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            
              20

      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

            
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                      # Create entry
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            
              20
            

            

                      entry = Entry.new(
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                        id: heading.heading_id,
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                        text: extract_text(heading.text),
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188.

      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189.

      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190.

      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

            
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                      # Find the correct parent in the stack
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            
              20
            

            

                      stack.pop while stack.length > level - @min_level + 1
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

            
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                      # Add to current parent
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            
              20
            

            

                      stack.last.children << entry
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

            
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                      # Push for potential children
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            
              20
            

            

                      stack.push(entry)
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                    end
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

                  end
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

            
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            
              1
            

            

                  def generate_section_number(counters, level)
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            
              3
            

            

                    parts = []
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            
              3
            

            

                    (@min_level..level).each do |l|
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            
              5
            

            

                      parts << counters[l] if counters[l]&.positive?
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

                    end
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            
              3
            

            

                    parts.join('.')
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                  end
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

            
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            
              1
            

            

                  def extract_text(text)

    212.

                    return '' if text.nil?
          
      213.

      214.

      215.

    155. 
            
              1

      163.

      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            
              1082

      169.

      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            
              53
            

            

                          return @ald_registry[ial] if ial.is_a?(String) && @ald_registry.key?(ial)

    171. 
            

            

            
          
      172.

      178.

                        # Try to transform using rules
          
      188.

      189.

      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

            
          
      191.

    192. 
            
              69

      212.

      221.

              54

              54

              23

      324. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    324. 
            
              7

      325.

      327.

      329. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    329.

    330.

      331. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    331. 
            
              23

      332.

              23

    338.

      339. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    339. 
            

            

            
          
      340. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    340.

      341. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    341. 
            
              16
            

            

                      if current_term
          
      342. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    342.
